title.purpose: App title in manager header. Appears once per view.

body.purpose: Tab titles, form labels, interactive elements.

mono.purpose: Keyboard hints and timestamps. Terminal-domain content only.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Floating overlays (tooltip, dropdown) that must read as elevated above a card surface. Not for cards or list items.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Default for all state transitions: border-color, color, opacity. Never slower. Never for layout properties.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Phosphor Green fill with Terminal Black text. Used for Save & Close, Backup Now.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3dba6e; color: #0d0f0d; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 7px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.75; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3dba6e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Surface Two background, Terminal Border stroke. Used for structural actions alongside a primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #182018; color: #dff0df; border: 1px solid #1e2d1e; border-radius: 5px; padding: 7px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #1a3a22; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { opacity: 0.75; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3dba6e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-hierarchy action. No background, no border. Used for View saved tabs, soft navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: none; color: #7a9a7a; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 0; font-size: 12px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #dff0df; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3dba6e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Metadata chip for tags. Pill shape. Two states: default (dim) and active (phosphor green).
components.css: .ds-chip-demo { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #1a2a1a; border: 1px solid #1e2d1e; border-radius: 20px; color: #7a9a7a; font-size: 11px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; padding: 2px 8px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #3dba6e; color: #dff0df; } .ds-chip--active { background: #1a3a22; border-color: #3dba6e; color: #3dba6e; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text field. Surface Two background. Focus shifts border to Phosphor Green.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #182018; border: 1px solid #1e2d1e; border-radius: 5px; color: #dff0df; font-size: 13px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; padding: 5px 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; width: 200px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7a9a7a; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3dba6e; }

components.name: Item Card
components.description: Saved tab list row. Surface One background, Terminal Border at rest, Phosphor Dim border on hover.
components.html:
G
GitHub — Pull Requests
github.com/owner/repo/pulls
work
components.css: .ds-item-card { background: #131a13; border: 1px solid #1e2d1e; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-item-card:hover { border-color: #1a3a22; } .ds-item-main { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 14px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-item-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 2px; background: #182018; color: #7a9a7a; font-size: 10px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-item-title { color: #dff0df; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-item-url { color: #7a9a7a; font-size: 12px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-item-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #1a2a1a; border: 1px solid #1e2d1e; border-radius: 20px; color: #7a9a7a; font-size: 11px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Section switcher between Saved, Backup, and Archive. Bottom-border active indicator, Phosphor Green on active tab.
components.css: .ds-tab-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2d1e; } .ds-tab-btn { background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: #7a9a7a; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; margin-bottom: -1px; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-tab-btn:hover { color: #dff0df; } .ds-tab-btn--active { color: #dff0df; border-bottom-color: #3dba6e; } .ds-tab-badge { background: #182018; border-radius: 10px; color: #7a9a7a; font-size: 11px; margin-left: 6px; padding: 1px 6px; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-tab-btn--active .ds-tab-badge { background: #1a3a22; color: #3dba6e; }

narrative.overview:
Tab Manager is a precision tool for power users who live in context. The design system takes its DNA from the CRT phosphor monitor — not as nostalgia, but as a source of honest constraints: high contrast, purposeful color, and a surface that recedes until you need it. Every element on screen is there because it works, not because it fills space.

The system uses a single accent — Phosphor Green (#3dba6e) — against near-black green-tinted surfaces. This is not a dark-mode app that happens to be green. The green is structural: every neutral is tinted toward the hue, from the base layer up through inputs and borders. The accent is rare; its rarity is the point.

Interaction feel is confident and deliberate. Elements do not eagerly animate. State changes are crisp — a border sharpens, a color shifts — and the UI steps aside. Satisfying in the way a clean git commit is satisfying: task done, cursor ready.
keyCharacteristics: Single accent color used in ≤15% of any surface
All neutrals tinted toward the green hue — no pure greys
Monospace (JetBrains Mono) reserved for keyboard hints and timestamps
Flat by default; tonal layering creates depth without shadows
Density respects power users; no decorative padding

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Phosphor Green is the only accent. It appears on ≤15% of any given surface. No secondary accent, no blue, purple, or teal.

rules.name: The Substrate Rule
rules.body: Every neutral from terminal-black to text-muted is tinted toward the green hue. Pure greys do not belong in this system.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: The accent color is never expressed as a glow, bloom, or diffuse box-shadow. A crisp border-color or background shift is the maximum expression.

rules.name: The Mono Restraint Rule
rules.body: Monospace type appears in exactly two contexts: keyboard hint strings and timestamps.

rules.name: The Tonal Stack Rule
rules.body: Never skip a layer. Inputs sit on Surface Two, which sits on Surface One (cards), which sits on Terminal Black.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No hover shadow on cards. Shadows are for true overlays only.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward the green hue.
Do use JetBrains Mono exclusively for keyboard hints and timestamps.
Do express depth through the tonal stack: Terminal Black → Surface One → Surface Two.
Do keep all state transitions at 150ms or under.
Do keep Phosphor Green rare — one active state, one primary action, one badge class per screen.
Do use uppercase with letter-spacing for structural section labels.
Do let borders and background tints carry hover/active states on list items.
donts: Don't add glow, bloom, box-shadow, or text-shadow to the Phosphor Green accent.
Don't add scanline overlays, blinking cursor decorations, or CRT filter effects.
Don't introduce a second accent color. Blue, purple, teal, cyan, orange — none belong here.
Don't use pure greys or pure black (#000, #111, #888, #aaa).
Don't animate layout properties. Use opacity and color transitions only.
Don't slide elements into place or use entrance animations for state changes.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter decoratively.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't replicate the generic dark SaaS look: pure charcoal + blue/purple accent.
